title: Roasted Spicy Canadian Borlotti Beans Stew
description: A hearty weeknight stew packed with spicy roasted flavors, perfect for a cold Canadian evening.
instructions: Rinse the borlotti beans and drain well.
Drizzle the olive oil over the borlotti beans and roast in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
Chop the carrots, red bell pepper, and onion, and sauté in a large pot over medium heat until tender.
Add the garlic, cayenne pepper, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and pepper to the pot and stir for 1 minute.
Add the roasted borlotti beans, chicken broth, and chopped carrots, bell pepper, and onion to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the stew until slightly aerated.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
